news.headline: Aquasight's ACE™ solution approved by MassDEP for CSO notification. Complete AI-driven digital twin suite now in AWS Marketplace.
news.summary: In Troy, Michigan on December 5, 2024, Aquasight revealed the expansion of its AI-based digital twin solutions following MassDEP's approval of their ACE™ solution for CSO notification. The suite of solutions includes various technological tools that provide insights for better decision-making. This development marks a significant milestone for the company as they continue to enhance their offerings.

news.headline: Alicia Wilson promoted as Managing Director of SEI's Nashville office in 2024, to lead local growth and impact.
news.summary: Specializing in local growth and community impact, SEI, an employee-owned consulting firm, has promoted Alicia Wilson to Managing Director of its Nashville office. This move was announced on December 5, 2024, and highlights Wilson's extensive experience in the company. This change aims to drive further community impact and development under Wilson's leadership.

news.headline: Bitcoin expected to surpass $124K by New Year, targets set at $150K for 2024, consensus.
news.summary: Experts predict that Bitcoin will surpass its current levels by the end of 2024, with price targets reaching as high as $150,000.

news.headline: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for Aehr Test Systems investors who suffered losses exceeding $50,000 (Jan 9 - Mar 24, 2024). Partner Josh Wilson urges affected investors to contact him directly.
news.summary: Attorney James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who experienced losses surpassing $50,000 in Aehr between January 9, 2024, and March 24, 2024, to reach out to him directly. If you fall into this category, consider contacting him to explore your potential options.

news.headline: Investors of Match Group with losses exceeding $50,000 between May 2, 2023 - November 6, 2024 can contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for legal action.
news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have incurred losses surpassing $50,000 in Match to reach out directly. Individuals who experienced losses exceeding $50,000 in Match during the period from May 2, 2023, to November 6, 2024, are encouraged to contact him to explore their potential courses of action.

news.headline: Investors of Celsius with losses exceeding $75,000 urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for potential claims.
news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, Partner of Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP specializing in Securities Litigation, is urging investors who have incurred losses surpassing $75,000 in Celsius to reach out to him for a consultation regarding potential options. If you have experienced losses exceeding $75,000 in Celsius within the period from February 29, 2024, to September 4, 2024, it is recommended that you contact Mr. Wilson to explore the available avenues.

news.headline: Intelliflex promotes Rodney Briere to President, strengthening innovation in modular data centers.
news.summary: Intelliflex, a prominent player in the modular data center sector, has appointed two key leaders to drive its innovative solutions for scalable data infrastructure. The company, based in Acheson, Alberta, named Rodney Briere as its President, elevating him from his previous role as Chief Financial Officer. Briere, boasting more than three decades of experience, spearheads Intelliflex's strategic vision. This move underlines the firm's commitment to advancing technology and expanding its global presence.

news.headline: Law firm Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is investigating claims for investors of Lilium N.V. who suffered losses over $50,000 from June 11 to November 3, 2024. Contact James Wilson for discussion.
news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is inviting investors who encountered losses surpassing $50,000 in Lilium to reach out to him regarding potential recourse options. If you suffered losses exceeding $50,000 in Lilium's stock between June 11, 2024, and November 3, 2024, Wilson encourages direct contact to discuss available avenues for addressing these financial setbacks.

news.headline: Médoc Wines offering free tastings at Spec's locations across Texas, showcasing exceptional red wines from Bordeaux.
news.summary: Médoc Wines is conducting complimentary tastings at Spec's outlets throughout Texas, offering customers the chance to sample the renowned red wines from Bordeaux. Guests can explore a selection of sophisticated, gastronomy-friendly wines that are ideal for various occasions.

news.headline: Low Voltage Battery Market valued at USD 597 million in 2023, projected for growth. Opportunities in automotive and electronics sectors.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India on December 5, 2024, it was reported that the Low Voltage Battery Market is categorized by Type (Single Use, Rechargeable) and Application (Automobiles, Electronic Devices). The market was valued at a staggering USD 597 million in 2023 with a projected updated market size.

news.headline: J.P. Morgan's Campbell Global acquires 40,000+ acres of Timberland in US Pacific Northwest, focusing on carbon capture & timber.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on December 5, 2024, J.P. Morgan Asset Management revealed that institutional investors under the guidance of Campbell Global, owned by the firm, have spearheaded the procurement of assets to be utilized for both carbon capture and timber products. This strategic move signifies a dual-purpose strategy that looks to manage investments targeting the extraction of carbon while also focusing on timber-related endeavors. The acquisition marks a significant milestone in the financial sector, underscoring the growing interest in sustainable initiatives.

news.headline: US 4-Week Bill Auction
Anaerobic Digestion Systems market will reach $32.1 billion by 2031 per Meticulous Research®.
news.summary: In Redding, California, a report released on December 5, 2024, revealed findings on the Anaerobic Digestion Systems Market. The report encompasses various aspects such as offerings (hardware, software, services), feedstock types (agricultural waste, municipal waste), capacities, applications, and sectors. Important numbers and statistics detailing this market research were not specifically mentioned.

news.headline: Investors of PACS Group with losses exceeding $50,000 can contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for possible legal action.
news.summary: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson of Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who have incurred losses surpassing $50,000 in PACS Group to reach out directly to him for a consultation on potential courses of action. If you have suffered losses of over $50,000 in PACS Group through common stock between specific dates, Wilson is available to discuss your options. Contact him for further guidance.

news.headline: US 4-Week Bill High Yield Actual 4.4% (Forecast -, Previous 4.550%)
US 4-Week Bill Bid-to-Cover Actual 2.74 (Forecast -, Previous 2.810)
Trump claims credit for Bitcoin hitting $100K milestone after supporting crypto agenda.
news.summary: The President-elect of the United States, Donald Trump, claimed responsibility on Thursday for Bitcoin reaching the milestone of $100,000. This comes after running a campaign that supported the use of cryptocurrencies.

news.headline: Entrust named Challenger in 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Access Management for 2nd year in a row. President Bhagwat Swaroop expresses gratitude.
news.summary: Entrust, a prominent provider of identity-centric security solutions, has been identified as a Challenger in the Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Access Management for the second year in a row. This recognition underscores Entrust's dedication to excellence in this field. Bhagwat Swaroop, President of Digital Security Solutions at Entrust, expressed gratitude for the acknowledgment, emphasizing their ongoing commitment to innovation and quality. This position in the Gartner Magic Quadrant showcases Entrust’s strong performance and expertise in Access Management.

news.headline: Kalmar Corp announces buyback of shares on 5.12.2024.
FORVIA: The combined voting rights and shares in the share capital have been disclosed.
Special holiday pricing for award-winning memoir "It All Belongs" in Kennebunk, Maine to comfort those grieving.
news.summary: Kennebunk, Maine - An award-winning memoir titled "It All Belongs: Love, Loss & Learning to Live Again" is offering a special promotion for individuals grappling with loss and grief during the holiday season. The memoir provides a poignant exploration of overcoming challenges and finding solace. To avail of this offer, individuals can access the book through the specified platform.

news.headline: MicroStrategy's leveraged ETFs driving Bitcoin surge; $3.4B inflows in Nov from $11B crypto market inflows. JPMorgan analyst insights.
news.summary: JPMorgan analyst Nikolaos Panigirtzoglou has highlighted the significant impact that MicroStrategy Inc's leveraged ETFs, including the Defiance Daily Target 2x Long MSTR ETF (MSTX) and the T-Rex 2X Long MSTR Daily Target ETF (MSTU), have had on the company's role as a proxy for Bitcoin (BTC). These ETFs have led to record inflows and heightened stock volatility and valuation for MicroStrategy. In November, ETFs linked to MicroStrategy stock contributed $3.4 billion to the $11 billion inflows in the crypto markets. These ETFs aim to provide amplified exposure to Bitcoin through MicroStrategy's stock.

news.headline: Dow Jones barely moves after jobless claims data, Nvidia and Meta in buy zones. Super Micro rises on Musk's AI plan.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones Industrial Average saw minimal movement in response to initial jobless claims data. Nvidia and Meta were identified as being in favorable buy zones. Super Micro exhibited growth following Musk's significant AI plan. Live coverage of the stock market activity can be found on Investor's Business Daily.Character count: 290

news.headline: Ferrero survey shows chocolate preferred over wine & baking during holidays. Dec 5, 2024. - PRNewswire.
news.summary: A recent survey conducted by Ferrero North America, a subsidiary of the Ferrero Group, revealed interesting holiday habits. The global sweet-packaged food company, known for brands like Ferrero Rocher®, Nutella®, Kinder®, and Royal Dansk®, shared the findings on December 5, 2024, in Parsippany, N.J. This survey sheds light on festive preferences and consumption trends amongst consumers. The Ferrero Group boasts a diverse range of beloved holiday treats and aims to keep up with the changing preferences of consumers.

news.headline: Researchers urge action on land restoration and food systems for climate and biodiversity. Collaboration between KAUST and Aeon Collective emphasized.
news.summary: In Thuwal, Saudi Arabia on December 5, 2024, a team of researchers from King Abdullah University of Science and Technology (KAUST) collaborated with Aeon Collective, a nonprofit focused on sustainable development. KAUST, known as Saudi Arabia's premier applied research university, joined forces with Aeon Collective to work on a project aimed at addressing sustainable development challenges. The collaboration aims to combine the expertise and resources of both institutions to create impactful solutions. KAUST's reputation as a top research university in Saudi Arabia, combined with Aeon Collective's dedication to sustainability, showcases a promising partnership.

news.headline: O-RAN Alliance's Global PlugFest Fall 2024 highlighted progress in open and intelligent RAN solutions.
news.summary: The O-RAN Global PlugFest Fall 2024 facilitated organized testing and integration of O-RAN products and solutions in a collaborative setting. This event saw participation from various industry stakeholders showcasing advancements in open and intelligent RAN solutions. The PlugFest marked significant strides in enhancing interoperability and innovation within the industry, with a substantial number of products and solutions being tested and demonstrated.

news.headline: Dan Krekelberg joins EcoEngineers as climate strategy director, bringing 15+ years of experience to support GHG emissions initiatives.
news.summary: EcoEngineers, a clean energy consulting, auditing, and advisory firm based in Des Moines, Iowa, has appointed Dan Krekelberg as their new climate strategy director. With over 15 years of experience in sustainability reporting, climate action planning, clean energy deployment, and greenhouse gas emissions measurement and reduction, Mr. Krekelberg is a seasoned climate policy expert and sustainability consultant. In his new role, he will be offering strategic advisory services at EcoEngineers.

news.headline: Investors of The Toronto-Dominion Bank with losses over $100,000 between Feb 29 to Oct 9, 2024 urged to contact lawyer.
news.summary: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who experienced losses exceeding $100,000 in TD from February 29, 2024, to October 9, 2024, to reach out directly to him. If you match this criteria and would like to explore your options, contact James Wilson for a consultation.

news.headline: French company discloses voting rights and shares: total capital of 106,862,389.20 euros, with 632,012,100 shares.
news.summary: A French corporation operating as a limited company, with a substantial registered capital of 106,862,389.20 euros, and headquartered at 14, rue Royale, 75008 Paris. The company is registered under the number 632 012 100 R.C.S. Paris and possesses a Legal Entity Identifier of 529900JI1GG6F7RKVI53.

news.headline: TraceLink named to Inc.'s 2024 Best in Business List in Manufacturing Category for supply chain solutions.
news.summary: Boston, on December 5, 2024, TraceLink, a leading digital network platform for supply chain orchestration, was honored in the manufacturing sector for its innovation and excellence. The company was recognized for its outstanding performance in driving supply chain solutions. TraceLink's achievement was highlighted in the Inc. list, solidifying its position as a key player in revolutionizing supply chain operations.

news.headline: Hilton Milwaukee undergoing $40M renovation by summer 2025, largest in Marcus Hotels & Resorts history.
news.summary: The Hilton Milwaukee, the largest hotel in Milwaukee, revealed plans for a significant renovation project that aims to solidify its position as the city's top choice for meetings and conventions. The renovation, estimated to exceed $40 million, is set to conclude by the summer of 2025. This initiative by Marcus Hotels & Resorts marks their most extensive refurbishment endeavor yet, intending to revamp guest rooms, 34,000 square feet of meeting areas, and event spaces within the hotel.

news.headline: Cleveland Museum of Natural History earns first LEEDv4 BD+C NC Platinum certification in US, highest honor in sustainable building with DLR Group.
news.summary: The Cleveland Museum of Natural History, along with DLR Group, has made history by becoming the initial U.S. museum to secure LEEDv4 BD+C NC Platinum certification, the highest recognition in sustainable building design. This accolade was granted by the U.S. Green Building Council (USGBC). LEED, standing for Leadership for Energy and Environmental Design, is the global benchmark for constructing, designing, and managing high-efficiency buildings. The museum’s achievement signifies a significant leap towards sustainable practices in the industry.

news.headline: Wild Eagle Saloon raises $2,905 for The Gathering Place during a month-long fundraiser in October at three locations.
news.summary: In December 2024, three Wild Eagle Saloon branches in Broadview Hts, Cleveland, and Streetsboro held a fundraising campaign during the month of October in support of Breast Cancer Awareness Month. The initiative proved successful, collecting a total of $2,904 to benefit The Gathering Place, a nearby organization dedicated to supporting individuals affected by breast cancer.

news.headline: Bitcoin's value soars past $100,000 due to support from Trump and Powell's comments on cryptocurrency.
Russell Stover Chocolates launches contest with Lacey Chabert, chance to win holiday getaway. Celebrating since 1923.
news.summary: Actress Lacey Chabert has joined forces with renowned chocolatier Russell Stover to spread holiday cheer. The partnership aims to inspire individuals to reminisce on joyful moments and share them with Russell Stover. Established in 1923, Russell Stover Chocolates is a beloved American brand. This collaboration comes as a festive treat to commemorate the holiday season.

news.headline: Investors with losses exceeding $75,000 in TMC urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for potential legal action.
news.summary: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who have experienced losses totaling over $75,000 in TMC to reach out to him directly. The losses must have occurred between May 12, 2023, and March 25, 2024. If you meet these criteria and wish to explore your options, Wilson is available for a discussion regarding your situation.

news.headline: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is investigating claims for investors of Edwards Lifesciences Corporation who suffered losses exceeding $100,000 between Feb 6, 2024 to Jul 24, 2024. Contact James Wilson if affected.
news.summary: Securities Litigation Partner James Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who have experienced losses surpassing $100,000 in Edwards within the period from February 6, 2024, to July 24, 2024, to reach out to him directly. If you fall into this category, it is recommended that you discuss your options by contacting him for further guidance.

news.headline: Former HOMER Energy CEO Peter Lilienthal joins Xendee as advisor to boost global distributed energy growth.
news.summary: A notable figure in the energy sector, Peter Lilienthal, the founder of HOMER Energy, has recently partnered with Xendee as an advisor. This collaboration aims to bolster the expansion of distributed energy and microgrid solutions on a global scale. Xendee's decision to onboard Lilienthal reflects their commitment to advancing sustainable energy practices. This strategic move is expected to leverage Lilienthal's expertise and experience in the industry. The involvement of such a seasoned professional signifies a significant milestone for Xendee, signaling their dedication to driving innovation and progress in the field.

news.headline: Toll Brothers plans luxury community in Encinitas, CA with 42 homes opening in early 2025.
news.summary: Encinitas, California - Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE:TOL), a prominent luxury home builder in the US, unveiled details about its upcoming project, The Cove at Encinitas. Located on La Costa Avenue in Encinitas, this exclusive community will consist of only 42 homes. The development is set to launch in early 2025, offering a limited collection of luxurious residences to potential buyers.

news.headline: Akima's subsidiary ASE to modernize IT infrastructure for USINDOPACOM, bolstering national defense.
news.summary: In Herndon, Virginia, on December 5, 2024, Akima, a leading supplier of products and services to the federal government, revealed that its branch, Akima Systems Engineering (ASE), has secured a deal with the U.S. Indo-Pacific Command (USINDOPACOM) to revamp essential operations.

news.headline: Canvas Medical releases Canvas SDK for safe AI adoption & custom automations. Transition from closed beta to general availability is a significant step.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, Canvas Medical unveiled its Canvas SDK, marking a significant milestone as it transitions from closed beta to general availability. The SDK launch signifies a substantial increase in capabilities for the EMR company, which aims to enhance everyday medicine practices.

news.headline: Fed bids for 4-week bills total $277.7 mln.
Info-Tech Research Group introduces sociotechnical wireframing for AI solutions, balancing human needs; systematic approach for design.
news.summary: Info-Tech Research Group has introduced a novel sociotechnical wireframe methodology that assists IT leaders in developing generative AI solutions. This method emphasizes the importance of balancing technological advancements with human considerations. The wireframe outlined in their publication, "Wireframe Your [title]," offers a structured approach to designing these solutions. This framework prioritizes both innovation and human-centric aspects. Through this methodology, IT leaders can create AI solutions that are efficient and considerate of human needs, ensuring a well-rounded approach to implementation.

news.headline: Infobip reports 11.6 billion Cyber Week communications, showing 41% increase from last year, emphasizing RCS importance.
news.summary: In Vodnjan, Croatia, leading global communications platform Infobip has announced unprecedented communication activity during Cyber Week, emphasizing the increasing significance of Rich Communication Services (RCS) and conversational interactions. Infobip documented a remarkable 11.6 billion communications interactions from Friday, November 29, to Monday, December 2, showcasing a substantial 41% surge from the previous year. This data demonstrates a notable shift towards conversational engagement, reflecting the evolving preferences in communication trends.

news.headline: Coloplast A/S held Annual General Meeting on 5 Dec 2024, adopting several resolutions.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, Coloplast A/S convened its Annual General Meeting, where several resolutions were approved.

news.headline: Cunard is revamping Queen Elizabeth for 2025 Miami-Caribbean & Alaska cruises, launching a luxurious program with a 2,000-passenger capacity.
news.summary: Valencia, California, December 5, 2024 - Cunard has revealed a groundbreaking renovation of Queen Elizabeth, setting the stage for her upcoming landmark voyages. The ship will embark on its first Caribbean program departing from Miami and its inaugural Alaska season from Seattle in 2025. With a capacity to accommodate up to 2,000 passengers, the luxurious Queen Elizabeth promises an unforgettable travel experience.

news.headline: MAPP Advisors appoints Aleksandra Teichman as Senior VP of Embedded Finance and Banking to lead firm's expansion.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on December 5, 2024, MAPP Advisors, a prominent advisory firm focused on fintech and payments, revealed the selection of Aleksandra Teichman as the new Senior Vice President of Embedded Finance and Banking. In her role, she will lead the firm's growth efforts in this area.

news.headline: Troomi introduces new App Store for families in Utah, offering three tiers of app options for child safety and flexibility.
news.summary: In Orem, Utah, Troomi, a pioneer in child-safe technology and promoting family digital wellness, has unveiled its latest development - the Troomi App Store, which is being made available to all users starting today. This significant upgrade features a distinctive three-tiered assortment of applications, aiming to boost safety and adaptability for families by granting parents unparalleled authority over their child's online activities. This initiative guarantees children the advantages of an app store environment while assuring parents complete control over their child's digital interactions.

news.headline: Monks, part of S4 Capital plc, achieves AWS Generative AI Competency, highlighting expertise in AI. Las Vegas, Dec. 5, 2024.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, in Las Vegas, Monks, a digital brand under S4Capital plc., proudly announced its attainment of the AWS Generative AI Competency. This recognition designates Monks as an AWS Partner that spearheads progress in leveraging artificial intelligence.

news.headline: Renaissance Philanthropy and XTX Markets create $9 million AI for Math Fund to support new AI projects in mathematics.
news.summary: A newly established fund, the AI for Math Fund, has been introduced by Renaissance Philanthropy and XTX Markets in an effort to propel groundbreaking discoveries in mathematics through AI tools. The fund is set to allocate $9.2 million towards supporting new projects in this domain. This initiative was jointly announced in Washington and London on December 5, 2024.
